title: Spark Custom Actions
description: Defines custom actions that can be executed on entity instances in a MintPlayer Spark application. Each key is the action name and the value defines its metadata and behavior. Place this file at App_Data/customActions.json.

$schema.description: Optional JSON Schema reference for editor IntelliSense.

TranslatedString.description: A translated string where keys are ISO language codes (e.g., 'en', 'fr', 'nl') and values are the translated text.

CustomActionDefinition.description: Defines the metadata and behavior for a custom action that can be triggered on entity instances.

displayName.description: Translated display name shown in the UI button/menu item for this action.

icon.description: Icon name for the action button (e.g., 'Copy', 'Delete', 'Send').

description.description: Human-readable description of what this action does.

showedOn.description: Where the action button is displayed. 'query' = list view only, 'persistentObject' = detail view only, 'both' = both views.

selectionRule.description: Selection rule that determines when the action is available based on selected items. Examples: '=1' (exactly one selected), '>=1' (one or more selected), '=0' (no selection required).

refreshOnCompleted.description: When true, the UI refreshes the current view after the action completes successfully.

confirmationMessageKey.description: Translation key for a confirmation dialog shown before executing the action. When set, the user must confirm before the action runs.

offset.description: Display offset/order for positioning the action button relative to other actions.
